title: Staleness/refresh process + schema-drift detection
context: Documented datasets drift from their recorded versions over time. This task documents a staleness/refresh process and how the validator flags schema drift so stale dictionaries become maintenance tasks.
objective: Document the staleness/refresh process and schema-drift detection that turns drifted dictionaries into maintenance tasks.
acceptanceCriteria: Documented process to detect when a documented dataset has drifted from its recorded version/release; validator flags schema drift; stale dictionaries become maintenance tasks.
